disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute onset over roughly 48 hours of severe whole-body heaviness and exhaustion, following an intense weekend of community meetings and advocacy
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and what was happening around then?
Tell me about how the tiredness came on.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit me over the last couple of days, right after a really full-on weekend of back-to-back meetings and advocacy. My whole body feels like lead and I've got nothing left.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New difficulty staying awake and markedly slowed thinking over the same 48 hours, with reduced processing speed by the patient's own account
trigger_question_examples: Are you finding it hard to stay awake?
Has your thinking or concentration changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep drifting off and I can barely keep my eyes open. My thinking has gone really slow and foggy — it's like my brain won't turn over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound emotional numbness and flat mood with a passive wish for everything to stop or go silent
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself emotionally?
What did you mean when you said you want the world to go silent?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just feel completely flat and numb. I've got nothing left and I just want everything to stop and go quiet for a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On sensitive direct questioning, denies a specific plan or intent to end their life, but describes feeling hopeless and that they have nothing left
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this drained they have thoughts of not wanting to be here — have you had any thoughts of ending your life?
Do you have any thoughts of harming yourself, or any plan to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have a plan or anything. I just feel so hopeless and empty, like I can't keep doing this. I just want it all to stop.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to get into that... I'm just so tired.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports no fever, no one-sided weakness or numbness, and remains oriented to place and time
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, or any weakness or numbness on one side?
Do you know where you are and what day it is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I've noticed, and no weakness on one side. I know where I am and what day it is — I'm just so slow and heavy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes no prescription medications and denies alcohol or recreational drug use
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any medications, including anything over the counter?
Any alcohol or other substances recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not on any medications. I don't drink and I haven't taken anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic background of persistent loneliness and exhaustion from feeling unseen and from repeatedly having to explain and justify their identity across communities
trigger_question_examples: It sounds like there's a lot going on — can you tell me more about what's been wearing you down?
How have things been for you more generally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been building for ages. I'm exhausted from feeling invisible and from always having to explain and defend who I am, and I feel caught between everyone and completely alone even in a crowd.
